description_long: This object is a large, straight-bladed sword with a broad, flat blade that tapers slightly towards a blunt, squared tip. The blade is predominantly dark, possibly black or deep gray, with a subtle sheen suggesting a metallic material. The crossguard is wide and angular, featuring metallic accents and a slightly winged design, providing both protection and visual distinction. The handle is cylindrical, brown in color, and appears to be made of wood or a wood-like material, capped with a faceted pommel for balance and grip. Decorative metallic elements are visible at the junction of the blade and guard, adding a touch of ornamentation. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for display or ceremonial use in an urban context.
description: A large, straight-bladed sword with a dark metallic blade, wide angular crossguard, and a brown cylindrical handle with metallic accents.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight, dark blade and the angular crossguard with the handle extending to the right.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the broad, flat blade, the symmetrical crossguard, and the cylindrical handle behind.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the blade and handle extending in the opposite direction.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the width of the blade, the back of the crossguard, and the end of the handle with the pommel visible.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, brown, wood-like, faceted pommel, minimal grip texture
attribute_ornamentation: metallic accents at guard and pommel
